title: petrosedum rupestre subsp. reflexum
intro: Petrosedum rupestre subsp. reflexum, also known as Sedum reflexum, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It is a low-growing, spreading plant with thick, fleshy leaves that are often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Sedum reflexum is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
